title: Internet and Games English
description: Talk with players around the world online!

scenes.title: Internet & Games English
scenes.content: This lesson is about English for the internet and games. Chat, games, social media — the doorway to friends across the planet.

scenes.title: Chat Shortcuts
scenes.content: lol (laugh), brb (be right back), omg (oh my god), gg (good game). Common in game chat too.
scenes.highlight:
lol = laugh
brb = be right back
omg = oh my god
gg = good game

scenes.title: Game Phrases
scenes.content: Let's play! Nice shot! Watch out! Mid-game calls should be short and strong. Encouragement changes the mood.
scenes.highlight:
Let's play!
Nice shot!
Watch out!

scenes.title: Social Media
scenes.content: Follow me! DM me! Comment below! Common in captions and bios.
scenes.highlight:
Follow me!
DM me!
Comment below!

scenes.title: Reactions
scenes.content: Cool! Awesome! Nice! That's so cute! More variety means easier comeback comments.
scenes.highlight:
Cool! / Awesome! / Nice!
That's so cute!

scenes.title: Joining a Team
scenes.content: Can I join? GG everyone! Polite in, polite out — that's how you become a 'good teammate'.

scenes.title: When in Trouble
scenes.content: I'm lost. What should I do? I'm AFK. 'AFK' = Away From Keyboard, commonly used.
scenes.highlight:
I'm lost.
What should I do?
I'm AFK.

scenes.title: Net Manners
scenes.content: Please be kind. Don't be mean. Even online, you're talking to real people. Kindness translates everywhere.
scenes.highlight:
Please be kind.
Don't be mean.

scenes.title: Before Logging Out
scenes.content: Thanks for the game! See you next time! Ending well gets invites to play again.
scenes.highlight:
Thanks for the game!
See you next time!

scenes.quizQuestion: What does 'gg' commonly mean in game chat?
scenes.quizExplanation: gg = good game. Used after a match to honor both sides.

scenes.speech: Net-English master! Play with the world! 🌟
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
